title: Ender's Journey Ender Dragon Boss Battle Music Datapack
description: Ender Dragon Battle music Datapack used in the Ender's Journey Modpack
body:
- You need to install the Resourcepack & Datapack to make it work correctly! - You can download the Resourcepack here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enders-journey-ender-dragon-boss-battle-music-resourcepack - You can use this Resourcepack freely in your Modpack giving credit to this project and the authors Kami Hikari (Main Song) and Kizarys (Victory Song) - You can use this Datapack freely in your Modpack giving credit to this project and the author StAnimaties - The Ender's Journey Ender Dragon Battle Music Resourcepack & Datapack is used in the Ender's Journey Modpack: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/enders-journey. - Added a new song that is played during the Ender Dragon Boss Fight
# Music Compositors - Kami Hikari - Kizarys # Datapacker - StAnimaties
